title: Definitions
doc_html:
§76. Definitions

            As used in this Part, "Physician's Report to Court" means the reports provided for in R.S. 28:56(A)(2)(b).

            Acts 2018, No. 375, §1.
doc_text:
§76.  Definitions
As used in this Part, "Physician's Report to Court" means the reports provided for in
R.S. 28:56(A)(2)(b).
Acts 2018, No. 375, §1.
